title: Conduct dozer operations
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct dozer operations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for dozer operation

pcs.text: Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing of safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing of safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing of safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Source and interpret dozer operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and interpret dozer operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and interpret dozer operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Assess the work-site and confirm the suitability of the machinery for the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the work-site and confirm the suitability of the machinery for the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the work-site and confirm the suitability of the machinery for the task.

pcs.text: Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements.

pcs.text: Fit and use personal protective equipment and confirm safety equipment applicable to the task being undertaken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit and use personal protective equipment and confirm safety equipment applicable to the task being undertaken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use personal protective equipment and confirm safety equipment applicable to the task being undertaken.

pcs.text: Conduct dozer routine pre-operational checks according to operation and maintenance manual and report faults or malfunctions to supervisor for repair
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct dozer routine pre-operational checks according to operation and maintenance manual and report faults or malfunctions to supervisor for repair?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct dozer routine pre-operational checks according to operation and maintenance manual and report faults or malfunctions to supervisor for repair.

pcs.text: Observe safety rules and regulations, including site rules and legislation and site specific instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe safety rules and regulations, including site rules and legislation and site specific instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe safety rules and regulations, including site rules and legislation and site specific instructions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for dozer operation

elements.title: Operate dozer

pcs.text: Carry out pre-start, and start up procedures according to health and safety in the workplace guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out pre-start, and start up procedures according to health and safety in the workplace guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pre-start, and start up procedures according to health and safety in the workplace guidelines.

pcs.text: Drive and operate dozer, and modify the operating technique to meet changing work conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Drive and operate dozer, and modify the operating technique to meet changing work conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Drive and operate dozer, and modify the operating technique to meet changing work conditions.

pcs.text: Continually monitor hazards and risks, and ensure safety of self, other personnel, plant and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Continually monitor hazards and risks, and ensure safety of self, other personnel, plant and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Continually monitor hazards and risks, and ensure safety of self, other personnel, plant and equipment.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with dozer operation and minimise impact
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with dozer operation and minimise impact?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with dozer operation and minimise impact.

pcs.text: Complete work task according to the agreed plan and within the operating capacity of the equipment and operator
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete work task according to the agreed plan and within the operating capacity of the equipment and operator?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete work task according to the agreed plan and within the operating capacity of the equipment and operator.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Operate dozer

elements.title: Complete dozer operation

pcs.text: Park dozer and conduct shut down procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Park dozer and conduct shut down procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Park dozer and conduct shut down procedures.

pcs.text: Perform routine operational servicing and minor maintenance according to dozer operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform routine operational servicing and minor maintenance according to dozer operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform routine operational servicing and minor maintenance according to dozer operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Identify and report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage to supervisor.

pcs.text: Clean, secure and store dozer in line with workplace practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, secure and store dozer in line with workplace practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, secure and store dozer in line with workplace practices.

pcs.text: Remove and store keys in the required location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove and store keys in the required location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove and store keys in the required location.

pcs.text: Maintain dozer use records in required format
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain dozer use records in required format?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain dozer use records in required format.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete dozer operation

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
